description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-breadcrumb`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-breadcrumb/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 27 defects â€” 0 P0, 10 P1, 17 P2, 0 P3

### P1 â€” High
- [ ] [Accessibility] Current page item with `href` renders as a navigable link
- [ ] [Accessibility] No keyboard-accessible "expand" for collapsed breadcrumb
- [ ] [Tests] `_handleSeparatorSlotChange` is entirely untested
- [ ] [Tests] No test for collapsed state with keyboard interaction
- [ ] [Storybook] `maxItems` and `jsonLd` properties missing from `argTypes`
- [ ] [Storybook] No story for collapsed/truncated breadcrumb (`maxItems`)
- [ ] [Storybook] No story with icon content
- [ ] [CSS] Hardcoded hex fallback values throughout item styles
- [ ] [Drupal] "Current page is always last item" assumption breaks Drupal rendering
- [ ] [Drupal] JSON-LD head injection incompatible with Drupal's head management

### P2 â€” Medium
- [ ] [TypeScript] `_itemCount` reactive state is a render-trigger hack
- [ ] [TypeScript] `Record<string, unknown>` used in JSON-LD entry builder
- [ ] [TypeScript] Private state accessed in tests via `as unknown as` cast
- [ ] [Accessibility] `aria-current="page"` placed on `listitem` host rather than the inner link/text
- [ ] [Accessibility] Ellipsis item acquires `role="listitem"` via `connectedCallback`
- [ ] [Tests] JSON-LD href values not verified
- [ ] [Tests] No test for `max-items` value equal to exactly item count
- [ ] [Tests] No test for dynamic item insertion/removal
- [ ] [Storybook] `subcomponents` declaration uses string value
- [ ] [Storybook] No story for separator slot (named slot usage)
- [ ] [CSS] No CSS truncation for long item text
- [ ] [CSS] `separator-slot` hidden via `display: none` without `visibility: hidden`
- [ ] [CSS] CSS `content` property value injection is fragile
- [ ] [Performance] JSON-LD side effect mutates `document.head`
- [ ] [Performance] Bundle size: cannot verify without build output
- [ ] [Drupal] No Twig template or Drupal integration example
- [ ] [Drupal] Server-side `aria-current` not documented

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
